description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white, with some sections featuring light gray and brown accents, including a small area with a terracotta-colored roof. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is surrounded by several leafy green trees, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The structure appears to have two stories, with a balcony or terrace visible on the upper level and a recessed entryway at the front.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, and brown accent roofing, surrounded by leafy trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, a balcony above, and trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's elongated shape, flat roof, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a small brown-roofed section and more trees, with fewer visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, flat roof, and additional windows, with trees in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, minimalistic door, and no visible porch or steps.
